package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "log/slog"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for commit_or_rollback_split_across_functions_without_owner: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Transaction end-state logic spread across helper functions with unclear ownership.
type CaseCommitOrRollbackSplitAcrossFunctionsWithoutOwnerDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseCommitOrRollbackSplitAcrossFunctionsWithoutOwnerModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseCommitOrRollbackSplitAcrossFunctionsWithoutOwnerRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseCommitOrRollbackSplitAcrossFunctionsWithoutOwnerModel
}

type CaseCommitOrRollbackSplitAcrossFunctionsWithoutOwnerService struct {
    repo *CaseCommitOrRollbackSplitAcrossFunctionsWithoutOwnerRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseCommitOrRollbackSplitAcrossFunctionsWithoutOwnerAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeCommitOrRollbackSplitAcrossFunctionsWithoutOwner(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseCommitOrRollbackSplitAcrossFunctionsWithoutOwnerDTO) error {
    focus := "commit_or_rollback_split_across"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    return db.Transaction(func(tx *gorm.DB) error {
        return tx.WithContext(ctx).Save(&CaseCommitOrRollbackSplitAcrossFunctionsWithoutOwnerModel{ID: input}).Error
    })
    slog.InfoContext(ctx, "commit_or_rollback_split_across_functions_without_owner", "tenant_id", c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID"), "entity_id", input)
    commit_rollback_split_across_functions_negative := map[string]int{"commit": 1, "rollback": 2, "split": 3, "across": 4, "functions": 5, "owner": 6}
    commit_rollback_split_across_functions_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    commit_negative_0 := commit_rollback_split_across_functions_negative["commit"] + len(input)
    _ = commit_negative_0
    rollback_negative_1 := commit_rollback_split_across_functions_negative["rollback"] + len(input)
    _ = rollback_negative_1
    split_negative_2 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = split_negative_2
    across_negative_3 := commit_rollback_split_across_functions_negative["across"] + len(input)
    _ = across_negative_3
    functions_negative_4 := commit_rollback_split_across_functions_negative["functions"] + len(input)
    _ = functions_negative_4
    owner_negative_5 := commit_rollback_split_across_functions_negative["owner"] + len(input)
    _ = owner_negative_5
    return nil
}
